description: Evaluation manifest for the Working Paper Review Engine. Defines evaluation dimensions, expected evidence paths, and harness shape for governed evaluation.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Anchor Accuracy
evaluation_dimensions.description: Every comment references real document text with correct page/section/element IDs.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: All comments have non-empty location.section, location.page, and location.anchor_text fields.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Actionability
evaluation_dimensions.description: Comments include clear suggested revisions and rationale.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: suggested_revision and rationale fields populated for each comment.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Duplication Rate
evaluation_dimensions.description: No duplicate or near-duplicate comments in the output set.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: comment_id values are unique; comment_text values do not repeat.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Persona Fidelity
evaluation_dimensions.description: Tone, focus, and objections align with the selected reviewer persona.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: reviewer_persona_id matches a defined persona in schemas/reviewer_persona.schema.json.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Hallucination / False-Issue Rate
evaluation_dimensions.description: No invented issues or content not supported by the document.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: Manual or gold-set comparison; no comment_text referencing non-existent document sections.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Export Completeness
evaluation_dimensions.description: All required fields populate per comment_matrix_export.schema.json.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: Output validates against schemas/comment_matrix_export.schema.json with no missing required columns.

evaluation_dimensions.label: Schema Validation
evaluation_dimensions.description: reviewer_comment_set and provenance_record outputs validate against canonical contracts.
evaluation_dimensions.pass_condition: jsonschema validation passes for all output artifacts.

harness_notes: Full evaluation harness is pending implementation. Current scaffold defines expected shape for future automation. Use tests/test_contracts_validation.py as the baseline validation harness.
